rationale: Section 26.0442 computes a rate adjustment using 'Current Total Value' and 'New Property Value' as inputs. Increasing the homestead exemption indirectly reduces taxable values, but the statute operates on whatever values exist; no textual conflict or amendment needed.
quote: the no-new-revenue maintenance and operations rate for the county is increased by the lesser of the rates computed according to the following formulas
_note: No direct reference to Tax Code §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts. The formula denominators (Current Total Value, New Property Value) would change in magnitude as a downstream fiscal effect, but the operative text requires no amendment.
